name: AgX Precision Agriculture Data Network API
what_it_does: AgX precision agriculture data network and standards REST API for farm data exchange, agronomic record sharing, and ag retail workflow integration. Enables AI agents to manage field boundary and grower farm data profile synchronization for multi-platform precision ag automation, handle prescription and recommendation exchange between ag retailers and growers for input recommendation automation, access soil sample data and fertility recommendation sharing for soil health analytics automation, retrieve as-applied, as-planted, and as-harvested data from connected farm equipment for field operation record automation, manage agronomic data consent and grower permission for compliant farm data sharing, handle crop input order and product recommendation linking for ag retail order automation, access agronomic advisor notes and field observation sharing for advisory workflow automation, retrieve tank mix and application record for pesticide regulatory compliance automation, manage weather and agronomic event data for farm performance analytics, and integrate AgX with Ag1Source, Trimble, AgriWebb, and major crop input platforms for connected ag ecosystem automation.
use_cases: Sharing prescription data from ag retail recommendation agents
Syncing field boundaries from multi-platform precision ag agents
Linking soil samples from fertility management agents
Connecting input orders from ag retail workflow agents
not_for: Farm accounting and cash flow management (use Farm Credit Services or QuickBooks)
Grain merchandising and cash grain price discovery
best_when: An ag retailer, agronomic advisor, crop input supplier, or precision ag platform wanting AI agents to automate farm data exchange, prescription sharing, and agronomic record synchronization across multiple farm management platforms via the AgX data network.
avoid_when: GROWER DATA CONSENT FOR AGRONOMIC DATA SHARING: AgX data network requires grower-specific consent before sharing farm data between ag retailers, agronomic advisors, and input suppliers; automated data pipeline built on AgX without verifying active per-grower consent creates AFBF Privacy Principles violation and potential ag data misuse. PRESCRIPTION DATA VERSION CONTROL FOR CHEMICAL APPLICATION: Automated prescription file exchange via AgX must track prescription version and application date; stale prescription delivered to applicator via automated workflow creates over or under application of crop inputs; implement prescription version locking before application confirmation. PESTICIDE REGISTRATION STATE COMPLIANCE FOR RECOMMENDATIONS: Automated pesticide recommendation exchange via AgX for specific grower field must verify pesticide label registration in applicable state and county; automated recommendation sharing for pesticides with state registration restrictions creates applicator compliance violation.

auth.notes: AgX uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes for grower consent-based data access. REST API with JSON. Founded as industry consortium-backed precision ag data exchange network. AgX Platform developed by Ag1Source, later expanded to network model. Farm data exchange standards for prescription, recommendation, and agronomic record sharing. Grower identity linked via SSO with major farm management platforms. Partners include Trimble, Winfield United, Nutrien Ag Solutions. Competes with Climate FieldView, Granular, and John Deere Operations Center for data network position.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — network membership and API subscription for ag retailers and platform partners
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual network membership by role (ag retailer, platform partner, input supplier); API access tiers by data volume and connection count
pricing.notes: Ag data exchange network. Annual membership-based pricing for ag retailers and platform partners. Grower access via partner platforms. No standalone developer sandbox.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; prescription and field data queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — PRESCRIPTION AVAILABILITY REQUIRES POLLING: AgX does not support native webhooks; automated prescription ready events, field boundary updates, and agronomic data availability notifications require scheduled polling; implement polling interval aligned with agronomic workflow cadence (planting, spraying, harvest season)

GROWER CONSENT SCOPE PER DATA RELATIONSHIP: AgX OAuth consent model requires grower to explicitly authorize each data relationship (grower → retailer, grower → advisor, grower → input supplier); automated data pipeline must verify active per-grower, per-relationship consent before accessing farm data; do not assume consent persists across crop year without re-authorization

PRESCRIPTION VERSION CONTROL FOR VARIABLE RATE APPLICATION: AgX prescription exchange may have multiple prescription versions for same field and crop; automated delivery of prescription file to variable rate controller must verify prescription version matches current crop plan; stale prescription delivery to applicator creates variable rate application error

NETWORK PARTNER AVAILABILITY FOR DATA EXCHANGE: AgX data exchange depends on both source and destination platform being active AgX network members; automated workflow assuming AgX connectivity between specific ag retail ERP and farm management platform fails if destination platform is not active AgX participant; verify network membership before building automated prescription pipeline

STATE PESTICIDE REGISTRATION VALIDATION: Automated pesticide recommendation exchange via AgX must include state registration validation for destination field location; pesticide label registration varies by state and county; automated recommendation delivery for restricted-use pesticides without applicator license verification creates regulatory compliance risk

CROP YEAR BOUNDARY FOR FIELD DATA: AgX field data and prescription records are scoped by crop year; automated queries spanning multiple crop years require explicit year parameter; cross-year field history aggregation without crop year context creates incorrect agronomic record attribution
agent_readiness.security_notes: Precision ag data network. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Grower field boundary, prescription, and agronomic recommendation data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Ag data network. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Grower farm data, field boundaries, and prescription records.
